calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Alexis Christine Beach, Esq., appearing for Petitioners. Vincent Ramirez father and Armel Morales Quizano mother of minors present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor 1. from Vins Vyrons Morales Quijano to Vins Vyrone Quijano Ramirez. Minor 2. Vins Vernard Quijano to Vins Vernard Quijano Ramirez. Minor 3. Vins Vrendaughn Quijano to Vins Vrendaughn Quijano Ramirez.
Petitioner (Mother) Armel Morales Quijano change of name to Armel Quijano Ramirez.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
